languages.text: "Тот мир, где правят техножрецы... Так вот он какой, Архивраг. Зарковские байки о нем даже вполовину не так плохи".
"That world ruled by the Tech-Priests... So that's what the Archenemy is like, is it? Our legends of it back on Zarkov are like child's stories in comparison."
languages.original_text: "Тот мир, где правят техножрецы... Так вот он какой, Архивраг. Зарковские байки о нем даже вполовину не так плохи".

traits.locale_text: "The world ruled by the Tech-Priests... So that's what it's like, the Archenemy. Our stories from Zarkov are child's play compared to that."
"That world ruled by the Tech-Priests... So that's what the Archenemy is like, is it? Our legends of it back on Zarkov are like child's stories in comparison."
"About what was on that cog world... So that's what it's like, the Archenemy. Our stories from Zarkov are child's play compared to that."
"The world ruled by the Tech-Priests... So that's what it's like, the Archenemy. Our stories from Zarkov are child's play compared to that."
"That world ruled by the Tech-Priests... So that's what the Archenemy is like, is it? Our legends of it back on Zarkov are like child's stories in comparison."

languages.text: 「歯車世界にあったものについて…それが敵の正体か。ザルコフの話を聞いたものと比べれば、子供のお遊びだ」
languages.original_text: "About what was on that cog world... So that's what it's like, the Archenemy. Our stories from Zarkov are child's play compared to that."

languages.text: "Tekno Rahiplerin yönettiği dünya... Yani Şerbaşı böyle bir şey, öyle mi? Zarkov'daki efsanelerimiz bunun yanında masal gibi kalıyor."
languages.original_text: "That world ruled by the Tech-Priests... So that's what the Archenemy is like, is it? Our legends of it back on Zarkov are like child's stories in comparison."

traits.locale_text: "Tekno Rahiplerin yönettiği dünya... Yani Şerbaşı böyle bir şey, öyle mi? Zarkov'daki efsanelerimiz bunun yanında masal gibi kalıyor."

languages.text: “那个被技术神甫统治的世界……原来混沌大敌就是这副模样！跟这比起来，扎尔科夫流传的故事简直像是童话。”
languages.original_text: "That world ruled by the Tech-Priests... So that's what the Archenemy is like, is it? Our legends of it back on Zarkov are like child's stories in comparison."

traits.locale_text: “那个被技术神甫统治的世界……原来混沌大敌就是这副模样！跟这比起来，扎尔科夫流传的故事简直像是童话。”

languages.text: "Diese Welt wird von den Techpriestern regiert ... Das ist doch der Erzfeind, oder? Dagegen sind unsere Legenden zu Hause auf Zarkov Kindergeschichten."
languages.original_text: "That world ruled by the Tech-Priests... So that's what the Archenemy is like, is it? Our legends of it back on Zarkov are like child's stories in comparison."

traits.locale_text: "Diese Welt wird von den Techpriestern regiert ... Das ist doch der Erzfeind, oder? Dagegen sind unsere Legenden zu Hause auf Zarkov Kindergeschichten."

languages.text: « Le monde dirigé par les technoprêtres... Voilà donc à quoi ressemble le Grand Ennemi. En comparaison, les légendes de Zarkov ressemblent à des contes pour enfants. »
languages.original_text: "That world ruled by the Tech-Priests... So that's what the Archenemy is like, is it? Our legends of it back on Zarkov are like child's stories in comparison."

traits.locale_text: « Le monde dirigé par les technoprêtres... Voilà donc à quoi ressemble le Grand Ennemi. En comparaison, les légendes de Zarkov ressemblent à des contes pour enfants. »

languages.text: «Ese mundo gobernado por tecnosacerdotes... Así es el Archienemigo, entonces. Nuestras leyendas en Zarkov parecen cuentos infantiles en comparación».
languages.original_text: "That world ruled by the Tech-Priests... So that's what the Archenemy is like, is it? Our legends of it back on Zarkov are like child's stories in comparison."

traits.locale_text: «Ese mundo gobernado por tecnosacerdotes... Así es el Archienemigo, entonces. Nuestras leyendas en Zarkov parecen cuentos infantiles en comparación».
